message.content:
<thought>**Getting Started on My Potion**

Okay, here's the situation. I'm in my bedroom, as expected. Bed, wardrobe, the usual. Looks like I was working on that new potion recipe before I got distracted. Good, it's right there on the bed - thank goodness.

I need to get started on that, obviously. I've got my goal, which is to brew this potion. Standard challenge, I can only carry two items. So, step one, and it's a no-brainer: grab that potion recipe. Can't exactly make it without knowing the ingredients, right?  Once I've got a grasp on the process, then I'll see what else I'll need. Time to get brewing.


</thought>> take potion recipe
